examples: In very hot chilies, the capsaicin content is so amazing that if you cut the pepper, you will immediately feel burning pain on your skin.
Hot Peppers' Capsaicin Helps Hypertensive rats.
The fact that capsaicin causes pain to mammals seems to be accidental.
Even a small quantity of capsaicin increased the perceived intensity of the solutions ingested.
But indulging in capsaicin does not quite meet the formal medical definitions of addiction.
